mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password_hash, role, enabled, created_at, updated_at FROM users ORDER BY id
SELECT id, username, password_hash, role, enabled, created_at, updated_at FROM users ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users ( username, password_hash, role, enabled, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{username}, #{passwordHash}, #{role}, #{enabled}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET password_hash = #{passwordHash}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
